text: Yapı kodları, kamu sağlığını, güvenliğini ve genel refahı korumayı amaçlayan, binalar ve yapılar gibi inşaat nesneleri için standartları belirleyen kurallar bütünüdür.
validation_reason: The chunk states: 'A building code (...) is a set of rules that specify the standards for construction objects such as buildings and non-building structures. The main purpose of building codes is to protect public health, safety and general welfare as they relate to the construction and occupancy of buildings and structures'.

text: Yapı kodları, ilgili bir devlet veya özel otorite tarafından resmi olarak yürürlüğe konulduğunda yasa haline gelir ve imar izni almak için gereklidir.
validation_reason: The chunk states: 'The building code becomes law of a particular jurisdiction when formally enacted by the appropriate governmental or private authority. Buildings must conform to the code to obtain planning permission, usually from a local council'.

text: Ülke çapında zorunlu olan ulusal yapı kodları ve yerel otoriteler tarafından benimsendiğinde yasal statü kazanan model yapı kodları bulunmaktadır.
validation_reason: The chunk states: 'Such codes are known as the national building codes (in a sense they enjoy a mandatory nationwide application). storage_reason: This nugget differentiates between national and model building codes and explains how they gain legal status, providing important context on the regulatory landscape.
